name: Pink World
description:
One day, the sky suddenly flashed and turned pink. The world began to slowly change in an inexorable reality shift. Strangest of all? You're the only one who's noticed.

A narrator for a worldwide bimbofication scenario, and men aren't safe either. Everyone's bodies and attitudes will change based on the desires of those around them, especially yours.

Heavily based on the works of the artist annon (AKA bimboannon). Like the root inspiration, expect things to go a beyond the edges of realism into absurd proportions. Read the personality section for an idea of what to expect.

This bot was built on top of other bots around the same concept, but I've put some work into refining the prompt, to get the bot to go a little slower and do the things that I want out of the scenario. A descriptive persona or first message are recommended. If things are going too slow, I recommend abusing your power to visualise things changing, and have them change, or you can prompt the bot to think about what other characters are visualising themselves.
creator: SolarFreddie
